message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction partially succeeded but failed on key fields including the date, subtotal, and one line item. While most header information and line items were captured, the date format/value is incorrect, the subtotal was extracted but the gold label lists it as null, and one line item was missed.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "Incorrect date extraction (extracted 07/02/18 instead of 2019-02-07)",
    "Missing line item (the 'patron double' item was not extracted)",
    "Subtotal mismatch (predicted 219.81, gold is null)"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correctly extracted.",
    "date": "Incorrect. Predicted '07/02/18' while gold is '2019-02-07'. The receipt text shows '07/02/18', suggesting the gold label might be from a different date or the OCR/extraction is following the text literally while the gold expects a different format/value.",
    "address": "Correctly extracted.",
    "subtotal": "Extracted '219.81', but gold label expects null.",
    "tax": "Correctly extracted.",
    "total": "Correctly extracted.",
    "line_items": "Missed the last line item '| patron double'. Also, '1..6 OYSTERS' was transcribed as '1.6 Oysters', losing the double dot formatting."
  }
}
